articles.title: Anbumani: In these 108 days! Soumya's body has been possessed by a spirit! Anbumani's mirth!
articles.title_original: Anbumani: இந்த 108 நாட்களில்! சவுமியா உடலில் ஆவி புகுந்துவிட்டது! அன்புமணி கலகல!
articles.content: At an event in Mamallapuram, Anbumani Ramadoss humorously remarked that "a spirit seems to have possessed Sowmiya in the last 108 days." His light-hearted comment drew laughter from the audience, while Sowmiya Anbumani was seen smiling shyly during the speech.
articles.content_original: At an event in Mamallapuram, Anbumani Ramadoss humorously remarked that "a spirit seems to have possessed Sowmiya in the last 108 days." His light-hearted comment drew laughter from the audience, while Sowmiya Anbumani was seen smiling shyly during the speech.

articles.title: Trump to take down Kim Jong Un? America in decapitation frenzy.. North Korea the next target?
articles.title_original: கிம் ஜாங் உன்னை தூக்கும் டிரம்ப்? Decapitation வெறியில் அமெரிக்கா.. அடுத்த டார்க்கெட்டில் வடகொரியா?
articles.content: Kim Jon UN News: The United States and Israel have jointly launched a war against Iran. On the very first day of the conflict, Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei was killed. Against this backdrop-and as the U.S. currently follows a "decapitation" strategy-shocking reports have emerged suggesting that President Trump's next target could be North Korean leader Kim Jong Un.
articles.content_original: Kim Jon UN News: The United States and Israel have jointly launched a war against Iran. On the very first day of the conflict, Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei was killed. Against this backdrop-and as the U.S. currently follows a "decapitation" strategy-shocking reports have emerged suggesting that President Trump's next target could be North Korean leader Kim Jong Un.

articles.title: Be careful Trump! You could be eliminated yourself.. Iran directly challenges the US President
articles.title_original: கவனமாக இருங்க டிரம்ப்! நீங்களே காலியாகலாம்.. அமெரிக்க அதிபருக்கு நேரடியாக சவால் விட்ட ஈரான்
articles.content: Iran Warns Donald Trump:  Iran warned Donald Trump after he threatened massive strikes, saying the US would hit Iran "twenty times harder" than before. Tehran cautioned Trump to be careful or face consequences, escalating tensions amid fears of a major military confrontation between the two countries.
articles.content_original: Iran Warns Donald Trump:  Iran warned Donald Trump after he threatened massive strikes, saying the US would hit Iran "twenty times harder" than before. Tehran cautioned Trump to be careful or face consequences, escalating tensions amid fears of a major military confrontation between the two countries.

articles.title: "You might have provoked Stalin, but don't do it with me!" Mamata warns Governor Ravi
articles.title_original: "நீங்கள் ஸ்டாலினை சீண்டி இருக்கலாம்.. ஆனால் என்னிடம் வேண்டாம்.!" ஆளுநர் ரவிக்கு மம்தா எச்சரிக்கை
articles.content: West Bengal CM Mamata Banerjee says Governor can't do whatever he do(ஆளுநர் ரவியை எச்சரித்த மம்தா): Mamata to Governor Ravi latest news in tamil.

articles.title: A huge danger to countries worldwide.. The situation is getting out of hand.. Putin's 'shock' warning
